'''Melenna Seltrayne''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who served as a member of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. She grew up on the streets of [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]], and was recruited into the Alliance following a botched attempt to pickpocket [[Koris Haslam]]. Joining Haslam's group of [[Commando/Legends|commandos]], Melenna went on several missions for the Alliance, including the [[Mission to Selnesh|rescue]] of [[Gebnerret Vibrion]] from the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] prison on [[Selnesh/Legends|Selnesh]]. Despite being in plain sight during a [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] ambush, she escaped the prison with her teammates and Vibrion without suffering any injuries, prompting [[Barsoulentinial Enkhet]] to claim that she was the group's luck.
